schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Rafting Course & Internship” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Tourism Development Board under the Department of Tourism, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to train and certify youth of Uttarakhand, aged 18 to 30 years, as skilled and professional river rafting guides.
schemeContent.benefits_md: The beneficiary will receive training and internship opportunities to become a river rafting guide.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to train and certify youth of Uttarakhand, aged 18 to 30 years, as skilled and professional river rafting guides. Under this scheme, rafting training and internship opportunities are provided to youth of the state.

children.text: The scheme “Rafting Course & Internship” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Tourism Development Board under the Department of Tourism, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to train and certify youth of Uttarakhand, aged 18 to 30 years, as skilled and professional river rafting guides.
The beneficiary will receive training and internship opportunities to become a river rafting guide.
Applicants must complete the prescribed application form and submit it along with the required documents to the office of the District Tourism Development Officer.
Upon completion of the tests, the District Tourism Development Officer will forward the list of shortlisted candidates to the headquarters.
Final selection of participants will be made by a committee constituted at the headquarters.

applicationProcess.process_md: - Applicants must complete the prescribed application form and submit it along with the required documents to the office of the District Tourism Development Officer. - Upon completion of the tests, the District Tourism Development Officer will forward the list of shortlisted candidates to the headquarters. - Final selection of participants will be made by a committee constituted at the headquarters.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a youth of Uttarakhand. 1. The applicant must be between 18 to 30 years of age. 1. The applicant must be educated. 1. The applicant must be mentally and physically healthy. > The total number of 215 beneficiaries will be selected.

children.text: The applicant must be a youth of Uttarakhand.
The applicant must be between 18 to 30 years of age.
The applicant must be mentally and physically healthy.
The total number of 215 beneficiaries will be selected.
